name: Cookies'n Cream Fudge
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Almond bark or vanilla-flavo candy coating, cut into pieces
12 Chocolate creme-filled cookies -- broken into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch-square pan with foil extending over the sides of the pan; butter the foil.
2. In a large heavy-duty saucepan, combine sugar, margarine, and milk. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Continue boiling for 3 minutes over medium heat, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat. Add marshmallow creme, candy coating, and vanilla; blend until smooth.
5. Pour half of the mixture into the foil-lined pan.
6. Sprinkle cookie pieces evenly over the surface.
7. Top with the remaining mixture.
8. Cool to room temperature.
9. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours or until set.
10. Remove fudge from the pan by lifting the foil; remove foil from fudge.
11. Using a large knife, cut into squares.
12. Store in the refrigerator. Makes 36 squares (about 1-1/2 pounds).
